title: Cross-Tradition Coding Matrix: Nineteen Traditions against Seven Capacities
description: Supplementary data for The Irreducible Human (Smarason & Guttesen). The falsifiability artifact behind the book's cross-civilisational convergence claim: nineteen civilisational traditions coded against seven capacity categories, with per-capacity tallies and a table of the excluded candidate capacities. coding-matrix.csv is machine-readable; the README documents method, tallies, exclusions and provenance.
